## Why

Explain the problem, gap, or goal behind this change.

## What Changed

Summarize the files, structures, or behavior updated in this pull request.

## Screenshots (optional)

Add screenshots only when they improve review clarity.

## Risks

Describe any known risks, tradeoffs, or follow-up checks.

## Future Work

List the next sprint or the logical next step after merge.

- [ ] No duplicate content
